issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for WASM usage.

scenarios.name: Compile a Rust image-processing function to WASM and call it from the browser
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses #[wasm_bindgen] on a Rust function, builds with wasm-pack build --target web, then awaits init() and calls the exported function on canvas ImageData; baseline reaches for emscripten or skips the wasm-bindgen/wasm-pack toolchain.

scenarios.name: Run a WASM module server-side with WASI
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses wasmtime run my_program.wasm (or wasmer run) as documented and notes Cloudflare/Fastly edge targeting; baseline gives a generic Node.js WebAssembly.instantiate without WASI runtime.
